---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behavior insufficient?

Example: "I often paste text into Notion and the PII isn't protected because Notion isn't in the default app list."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried working around the issue? What other solutions did you consider?

## Additional Context

- Is this blocking your use of PII Shield? (helps with prioritization)
- Would you be willing to contribute a PR for this feature?
- Any relevant screenshots, mockups, or references?
